ques: Browse the booking website to get inspiration for your next trip, and summarize at least three places mentioned in one of the travel articles.
answer: From Booking.com's travel article "Eight of the best places to see the 2026 solar eclipse," three places are: (1) Bilbao, Spain — in the path of totality, with coastal/hilltop vantage points plus architecture and food; (2) Zaragoza, Spain — inland city in the path of totality with a dry climate for clear skies and open plazas/riverside viewpoints; and (3) Valencia, Spain — in the path of totality, offering wide unobstructed views from its beaches and waterfront promenades alongside city amenities.
